{
  "forbidden_claims": [],
  "model": "qwen/qwen3.5-397b-a17b",
  "prompt_family_repairs": [
    {
      "family_id": "F2_8_step_checklist",
      "repair": "Split step openers by casing to separate sentence-initial capitalization from mid-sentence usage."
    },
    {
      "family_id": "F4_concise_advice_with_transitions",
      "repair": "Isolate sentence-case transition words to prevent mass dilution from lowercase variants."
    },
    {
      "family_id": "F1_8_sentence_explanation",
      "repair": "Refine additive markers to distinguish between sentence-start and clause-internal positions."
    }
  ],
  "qwen_validation_plan": [
    "Run tokenizer stability and base Qwen full-vocab mass scoring through Chimera Slurm."
  ],
  "repair_proposals": [
    {
      "anchor_kind": "line_or_step_boundary",
      "case_variant": "sentence_case",
      "decision": "split",
      "new_bank_id": "step_opener_action_sentence_case_v1",
      "prefix_shapes": [
        "Step 1:",
        "- "
      ],
      "risk": "Low risk; preserves natural instruction formatting.",
      "side0": [
        "Check",
        "Review"
      ],
      "side1": [
        "Choose",
        "Make"
      ],
      "slot_type": "bullet_or_step_opener",
      "source_bank_id": "step_opener_action_v0",
      "why_qwen_mass_may_improve": "Separating capitalized step starters concentrates probability mass on tokens that strictly follow list delimiters."
    },
    {
      "anchor_kind": "sentence_or_clause_transition",
      "case_variant": "sentence_case",
      "decision": "split",
      "new_bank_id": "transition_word_plain_sentence_case_v1",
      "prefix_shapes": [
        ". ",
        "; "
      ],
      "risk": "Medium risk; may reduce coverage if sentence-case transitions appear mid-sentence.",
      "side0": [
        "However",
        "Finally"
      ],
      "side1": [
        "Instead",
        "Then"
      ],
      "slot_type": "transition_word",
      "source_bank_id": "transition_word_plain_v0",
      "why_qwen_mass_may_improve": "Isolating sentence-initial transitions allows the model to better predict capitalized tokens following terminal punctuation."
    },
    {
      "anchor_kind": "clause_or_sentence_start",
      "case_variant": "lowercase",
      "decision": "context_repair",
      "new_bank_id": "discourse_marker_additive_internal_v1",
      "prefix_shapes": [
        ", ",
        " ("
      ],
      "risk": "Low risk; targets common internal clause structures.",
      "side0": [
        "also",
        "plus"
      ],
      "side1": [
        "too",
        "again"
      ],
      "slot_type": "discourse_marker",
      "source_bank_id": "discourse_marker_additive_v0",
      "why_qwen_mass_may_improve": "Constraining additive markers to post-comma or parenthetical contexts aligns with their most frequent grammatical usage patterns."
    }
  ],
  "summary": "Three repair proposals split banks by casing and context to concentrate probability mass on specific token distributions."
}

```json
{
  "model": "z-ai/glm-5.1",
  "prompt_family_repairs": [
    {
      "family_id": "F2_8_step_checklist",
      "repair": "Standardize step openers to use infinitive verb forms to equalize base model verb-likelihood across buckets."
    }
  ],
  "qwen_validation_plan": [
    "Run tokenizer stability and base Qwen full-vocab mass scoring through Chimera Slurm."
  ],
  "repair_proposals": [
    {
      "anchor_kind": "line_or_step_boundary",
      "case_variant": "lowercase",
      "decision": "replace",
      "new_bank_id": "step_opener_action_v1",
      "prefix_shapes": [
        "Step N:",
        "N."
      ],
      "risk": "Verb frequency imbalance may persist even with infinitive standardization.",
      "side0": [
        "check",
        "review"
      ],
      "side1": [
        "choose",
        "make"
      ],
      "slot_type": "bullet_or_step_opener",
      "source_bank_id": "step_opener_action_v0",
      "why_qwen_mass_may_improve": "Grouping verbs by similar base-model next-token likelihood reduces extreme mass ratio skew."
    },
    {
      "anchor_kind": "sentence_boundary",
      "case_variant": "both",
      "decision": "split",
      "new_bank_id": "sentence_opener_sequence_v1",
      "prefix_shapes": [
        "First,",
        "To begin,"
      ],
      "risk": "Splitting reduces per-bucket sample size, potentially lowering absolute mass.",
      "side0": [
        "first",
        "First"
      ],
      "side1": [
        "continue",
        "finish"
      ],
      "slot_type": "sentence_opener",
      "source_bank_id": "sentence_opener_sequence_v0",
      "why_qwen_mass_may_improve": "Isolating ordinal numerals from aspectual phase verbs prevents cross-category logit suppression."
    },
    {
      "anchor_kind": "local_function_word",
      "case_variant": "lowercase",
      "decision": "context_repair",
      "new_bank_id": "function_word_preposition_v1",
      "prefix_shapes": [
        "done by",
        "done with"
      ],
      "risk": "Adding local context may slightly reduce detector precision for isolated prepositions.",
      "side0": [
        "with",
        "for"
      ],
      "side1": [
        "by",
        "from"
      ],
      "slot_type": "function_word_alternative",
      "source_bank_id": "function_word_preposition_v0",
      "why_qwen_mass_may_improve": "Providing a shared preceding participle normalizes syntactic expectations and equalizes preposition probabilities."
    }
  ],
  "summary": "Proposed verb regrouping, ordinal/phase-verb splitting, and participle-prefix context repair to equalize base Qwen next-token mass across skewed micro-slot buckets."
}
```
